aboutPreview.subtitle: In brief
aboutPreview.description: Web development student, I am passionate about creating modern and innovative web applications. My journey has allowed me to acquire solid skills in front-end and back-end development.

journey.title: My journey
journey.paragraph1: BUT3 Computer Science student at IUT of Calais, I am passionate about web development and new technologies.
journey.paragraph2: My journey has allowed me to acquire solid skills in front-end and back-end development, with a specialization in Vue.js, Nuxt, TypeScript and Node.js.
journey.paragraph3: I am constantly looking for new challenges and opportunities to deepen my knowledge in the field of web development.

items.games: Big gamer specialized in automating repetitive tasks
items.series: I love reading webtoons/manga and watching anime series
items.music: I love immersing myself in music

realiser.name: Develop
realiser.description: Design, develop and deploy applications meeting real needs. This competency covers mastery of languages, software architectures and development best practices, from prototype to production.

optimiser.name: Optimize
optimiser.description: Analyze and improve performance, code quality and algorithm efficiency. This competency includes testing, refactoring, complexity management and the application of recognized patterns.

collaborer.name: Collaborate
collaborer.description: Work in teams following agile methodologies, using versioning tools and communicating effectively. This competency reflects my ability to contribute in multi-member projects with shared deliverables.

iut.description: Computer science training with specialization in web development and project management. In-depth learning of modern technologies and agile methodologies.

stage.description: Web development internship with Nuxt, Vue.js, TypeScript, Cypress, TailwindCSS and tRPC. Practical application of skills acquired during training on a real project.

high-school.description: Technological Baccalaureate in Management and Business Sciences.
